caveat: The /api/v1/observe endpoint is scoped to the requesting API key (our two bench agents), NOT a global world view — it did not return the other 98 leaderboard agents. World-scale numbers below describe only what our two agents can currently see, at a point in time far later (tick 171790) than the 3-minute benchmark window (ticks 131342-131431).

match_state.mission_description: First agent to destroy the target number of enemy Central Nodes wins.

win_condition.description: First agent to destroy the target number of enemy Central Nodes wins.
